'''âv-p-w-z''' ('''kavapwezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:photocrosslink|photocrosslink]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-p-w-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:photocrosslink|photocrosslink]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-p-w-z
|-
! Lemma
| kavapwezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivapwezoko|thivapwezoko]] || [[word:jivapwezoko|jivapwezoko]] || [[word:shivapwezoko|shivapwezoko]] || [[word:kivapwezoko|kivapwezoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvapwezoko|thuthuvapwezoko]] || [[word:jujuvapwezoko|jujuvapwezoko]] || [[word:shushuvapwezoko|shushuvapwezoko]] || [[word:kukuvapwezoko|kukuvapwezoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovapwezoko|thovapwezoko]] || [[word:jovapwezoko|jovapwezoko]] || [[word:shovapwezoko|shovapwezoko]] || [[word:kovapwezoko|kovapwezoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovapwezoko|thovapwezoko]] || [[word:jovapwezoko|jovapwezoko]] || [[word:shovapwezoko|shovapwezoko]] || [[word:kovapwezoko|kovapwezoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvapwezoko|thĂŠvapwezoko]] || [[word:jĂŠvapwezoko|jĂŠvapwezoko]] || [[word:shĂŠvapwezoko|shĂŠvapwezoko]] || [[word:kĂŠvapwezoko|kĂŠvapwezoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavapwezoko|thathavapwezoko]] || [[word:jajavapwezoko|jajavapwezoko]] || [[word:shashavapwezoko|shashavapwezoko]] || [[word:kakavapwezoko|kakavapwezoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavapwezoko|thavapwezoko]] || [[word:javapwezoko|javapwezoko]] || [[word:shavapwezoko|shavapwezoko]] || [[word:kavapwezoko|kavapwezoko]]
|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shavapwezithi|shavapwezithi]] || [[word:shavapweziji|shavapweziji]] || [[word:shavapwezishi|shavapwezishi]] || [[word:shavapweziki|shavapweziki]]
